goal: Split the largest runtime test-surface files into focused scenario and helper modules without changing production behavior, public APIs, fixture schema, or renderer boundaries, then close the lane with fresh evidence.
checkpoints: after JRTSS-020 conformance and adapter test surface split compiles
after JRTSS-030 drag and interaction test surface split compiles
side_effect_policy: Commit only after user confirmation; do not push; do not revert unrelated user changes.
stop_conditions: scope expands into core tests, new gesture kernels, adapter crates, renderer smoke tests, or wgpu/egui/Fret dependencies
result: Runtime test-surface split completed and closed with package, clippy, JSON, and diff evidence.
